PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?movie ?movieLabel(MIN(?releaseDate) AS ?earliestRelease) WHERE {
  wd:Q175535 wdt:P161 ?movie .
  ?movie wdt:P31 wd:Q11424 ; wdt:P577 ?releaseDate ; wdt:P144 ?basedOn .
  ?basedOn wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q2310028 .
  ?movie rdfs:label ?movieLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?movieLabel) = 'en')
  .
}
GROUP BY ?movie ?movieLabel
ORDER BY ASC(?earliestRelease)
LIMIT 1
